profile.name: Muhammad Farouk
profile.headline: Python Developer
profile.summary: An innovative and dynamic professional with a BSc in Zoology & Chemistry and a diverse career spanning tutoring, quality assurance, graphics, and software development. Proven expertise in educational technology, data analysis, and content automation with a robust portfolio in academic publishing and e-learning solutions. Passionate about leveraging technology to enhance learning and operational efficiency. Demonstrated success in content management, data analysis, and the automation of tasks within content teams. Adept in Python, Excel, and Google Apps Script to enhance efficiency and foster data-driven decision-making.

experience.title: Content Engineer
bullets: Drive cross-functional efficiency by designing and deploying custom AI agents and automated scripts, cutting down manual task times across multiple business units.
Architect and develop internal tools and web applications to streamline workflows for Production, HR, and Finance divisions, significantly reducing operational bottlenecks.
Lead end-to-end data processing and advanced data analysis, transforming raw datasets into actionable insights to improve operational decision-making and data integrity.
Manage complex content migration initiatives, architecting robust pipelines for seamless, bulk data transformation and migration from legacy systems to modern structures.
Design and launch next-generation production systems that optimize content delivery while maintaining strict quality and productivity standards.
Engineer automated pipelines for digital product generation, enabling the bulk creation of high-quality sessions, books, exams, question banks, and audio assets through AI integration.

experience.title: Python Developer (Automation and Data Specialist)
bullets: Developed and deployed a suite of Python-based tools to automate complex data processing and content management tasks, significantly enhancing operational efficiency and reducing manual effort for content teams.

bullets.text: Engineered a robust data migration pipeline to process over 600,000 JSON files. This involved creating sophisticated Python scripts for data categorization, cleaning, and transformation, including:
subitems: Parsing XML files to replace SVG elements with corresponding LaTeX code in JSON.
Converting LaTeX commands into MathLive syntax to support a modern, interactive content standard.
Implementing a YAML-based regex management system for precise, large-scale text and code replacements.
Developing specialized functions to handle edge cases and ensure high-fidelity data conversion.

bullets: Led data-driven initiatives by performing large-scale data extraction, cleaning, and analysis using Python, enabling informed strategic decision-making.
Authored and optimized scalable Python scripts for efficiency, ensuring seamless processing of large datasets and automating critical file management tasks.

bullets.text: Contributed to open-source by publishing selected Python automation tools. A portfolio of projects is available on my GitHub:

bullets: Ensured data integrity throughout the migration and transformation processes by implementing rigorous testing, debugging, and validation protocols.

experience.title: Graphics Quality Assurance Specialist, Newcomers Trainer, and Python Developer
bullets: Devised innovative drawing techniques utilizing LaTeX, Chemdoodle, Adobe Illustrator, and Adobe Photoshop.
Orchestrated comprehensive training programs for newcomers, monitoring progress and providing ongoing support.

experience.meta: Egypt Man Co. for Food Industries, Cairo, Egypt | Feb 2015 - Jun 2016
bullets: Oversaw quality control processes and material standards, ensuring adherence to company and industry guidelines.
Produced technical files to facilitate clear communication and project documentation.

experience.title: Finalization Quality Assurance Specialist
experience.meta: Hindawi Publishing, Cairo, Egypt | Sep 2012 - Feb 2015
bullets: Conducted rigorous quality checks to ensure published materials aligned with in-house journal styles and standards.
Generated HTML and ePub versions of articles, enhancing accessibility and reader engagement.

experience.title: Medical Customer Service Representative
experience.meta: Wasla Outsourcing, Cairo, Egypt | Mar 2011 - Jun 2012
bullets: Managed patient inquiries with empathy and efficiency, maintaining high standards of customer service and care.

experience.title: Science Teacher
experience.meta: Talaea Al-Azhar Al-Sharief Institute, Cairo, Egypt | Sep 2009 - Aug 2010
bullets: Delivered engaging science lessons to prep-school students, fostering a love of learning and scientific inquiry.

achievements.title: Hawary Shop — Full-Stack E-Commerce Platform
achievements.meta_html: Personal portfolio project | Jan 2025 - Present | Hosted on Render
achievements.summary_html: Designed, built, and deployed a production-ready bilingual e-commerce platform (mist-app.onrender.com) with Python, Flask, PostgreSQL, and Gunicorn — modular app/ architecture with env validation on startup.

subitems: Browse → product image gallery → cart → promo codes → Paymob or cash-on-delivery → order tracking with automated status emails.
Per-governorate delivery fees with dimensional-weight calculation.
Wishlist, verified buyer reviews and star ratings, DB-driven Arabic/English translations with RTL and Cairo/Inter typography.
Sidebar admin UI: CRUD, reports, promo codes, translation management, wishlist oversight, and TOTP 2FA.
Paymob integration with strict webhook HMAC verification, refunds, and failed-transaction logging.
CSP via Flask-Talisman, login lockout, scrypt password hashing, upload whitelist; pytest suite (~27 tests) covering auth, cart, checkout, SEO, and email.
Per-page meta, Open Graph, Twitter cards, Product JSON-LD, dynamic sitemap and robots.txt; SEO-friendly product slug URLs remain a planned follow-up.
